The Gallery presents

Daniele D'Agnelli

A Retrospective Exhibition 2012 — Present

EXHIBITION: THE MAKING OF AN ENGINEER

a retrospective | curated by daniele d'agnelli

GALLERY I — FOUNDATIONS (2005-2011)

bsc computer science, university of bari aldo moro, italy. where the code began. algorithms, data structures, the classical training.

GALLERY II — THE FIELD YEARS (2012-2021)

a decade of applied practice: software engineering at accenture (milan), consulting across codec (dublin), accenture (london), and deloitte (london). each role a new medium, each client a new canvas.

GALLERY III — THE RETURN TO STUDY (2021-2023)

msc ethical hacking & cybersecurity, abertay university, dundee. gchq-certified programme. graduated with distinction. because the best practitioners never stop being students.

PERMANENT COLLECTION

stanford machine learning (2016) · deeplearning.ai neural networks · deep reinforcement learning nanodegree · imperial college mathematics for ml · stanford probabilistic graphical models (with honors) · hack the box · claude code / ai engineering

[exhibition continues] [github] [linkedin]
